flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at West Shore Community College rose 47% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at West Shore Community College rose 38% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.4k → $8.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at West Shore Community College fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (18.5% → 15.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at West Shore Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).
